name: sigil-mural-engine
description: Animated canvas 'engine' rendering of the SIGIL 8-piece mural. Built with the shared sigil-wallet node_modules (FLUXFOOD one-dep-tree lever). Never `npm run` — build with ./node_modules/.bin/vite build.
